name: Climate Transition Analytics
description: Advanced climate scenario analysis platform for portfolio decarbonization pathways, TCFD reporting automation, and net-zero alignment tracking across £1.2 trillion AUM. Enables investment teams to model transition risks and identify green investment opportunities.

features.name: Climate Scenario Engine
features.description: Multi-scenario climate modeling engine supporting NGFS scenarios, custom pathways, and stress testing for portfolio-level transition risk assessment.
acceptanceCriteria: All 6 NGFS climate scenarios implemented
Custom scenario builder supports 50+ parameters
Portfolio stress test runs complete in <30 minutes for £100bn AUM
Results validated against third-party climate models

stories.name: NGFS Scenario Implementation
stories.description: As a Climate Analyst, I need the NGFS reference scenarios so that I can assess portfolio alignment with standard climate pathways.
acceptanceCriteria: Given NGFS publishes scenarios, When imported, Then all 6 scenarios are available (Orderly, Disorderly, Hot House)
Given scenario selected, When applied to portfolio, Then sector-level transition risks are calculated
Given NGFS updates scenarios, When refresh runs, Then new data is available within 5 business days

tasks.name: Parse and import NGFS scenario data

stories.name: Custom Scenario Builder
stories.description: As a Portfolio Manager, I need to create custom climate scenarios so that I can model specific transition pathways for client mandates.
acceptanceCriteria: Given scenario builder opens, When parameters are adjusted, Then preview shows impact in real-time
Given custom scenario is saved, When applied, Then it appears alongside NGFS scenarios
Given scenario is shared, When colleague accesses, Then full configuration is available

stories.name: Portfolio Stress Testing
stories.description: As a Risk Manager, I need to stress test portfolios against climate scenarios so that I can quantify transition risk exposure.
acceptanceCriteria: Given portfolio is selected, When stress test runs, Then results show VaR, expected shortfall by scenario
Given £100bn portfolio, When full analysis runs, Then completion occurs within 30 minutes
Given results are ready, When exported, Then regulatory-ready format (TCFD/ISSB) is available

tasks.name: Build VaR and expected shortfall calculations

features.name: Net-Zero Alignment Tracker
features.description: Real-time tracking of portfolio alignment to net-zero targets, including implied temperature rise (ITR), transition pathway scoring, and engagement progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Portfolio ITR calculated for all £1.2T AUM
Alignment scores updated daily for active funds
Engagement tracker links to stewardship activities
Client-facing reports generated automatically

stories.name: Implied Temperature Rise Calculation
stories.description: As an ESG Analyst, I need ITR calculations so that I can communicate portfolio climate alignment to clients.
acceptanceCriteria: Given company emissions data, When ITR calculated, Then temperature score is 1.5C-4C range
Given portfolio weights, When aggregated, Then weighted average ITR is displayed
Given methodology is queried, When documentation accessed, Then full calculation transparency available

stories.name: Client Net-Zero Dashboard
stories.description: As a Client Relationship Manager, I need client-facing dashboards so that I can demonstrate portfolio climate credentials.
acceptanceCriteria: Given client logs in, When dashboard loads, Then portfolio ITR and alignment are visible
Given client selects fund, When detailed view opens, Then sector-level breakdown is available
Given client exports report, When PDF generated, Then branded, regulatory-compliant document is produced

features.name: TCFD Reporting Automation
features.description: Automated generation of TCFD-aligned climate disclosures, including governance, strategy, risk management, and metrics sections.
acceptanceCriteria: Annual TCFD report generated in <4 hours (vs 4 weeks manual)
All 11 TCFD recommendations addressed with data-driven narratives
Audit trail for all data points and calculations
Multi-format output (PDF, XBRL, web)

stories.name: TCFD Data Aggregation Pipeline
stories.description: As a Compliance Officer, I need automated data aggregation so that TCFD reports use consistent, auditable data.
acceptanceCriteria: Given reporting period closes, When pipeline runs, Then all TCFD metrics are calculated
Given data point is queried, When lineage accessed, Then full source-to-report trail is visible

tasks.name: Map TCFD metrics to data sources

stories.name: AI-Powered Narrative Generation
stories.description: As a Report Writer, I need AI assistance so that qualitative TCFD sections are drafted efficiently.
acceptanceCriteria: Given metrics are finalized, When AI drafts narrative, Then governance section is generated
Given draft is reviewed, When editor makes changes, Then version history is maintained

risks.name: Climate data provider contract renewal
risks.mitigation: Negotiating multi-year contract with MSCI; backup evaluation of Sustainalytics

risks.name: Regulatory methodology changes
risks.mitigation: Monthly regulatory scanning; flexible calculation engine design

risks.name: Client data sensitivity concerns
risks.mitigation: Data anonymization for analytics; client consent workflow implemented

dependencies.name: MSCI ESG Data Feed
dependencies.description: Weekly emissions and ESG score updates

dependencies.name: Enterprise Data Platform
dependencies.description: Historical data storage and analytics infrastructure
